nodes.name: ageoa.mcmc_foundational.kthohr_mcmc.mcmc_algos
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: dispatch_mcmc_algorithm
nodes.description: Routes to the chosen sampling algorithm for drawing random samples from a target distribution. Supports seven sampling methods including random-walk, gradient-based, and population-based approaches.
nodes.type_signature: (log_target_density: np.ndarray, initial_state: np.ndarray, n_draws: int) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
